mnemonics: CIA S3: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability are the core security principles, often implemented using services like Amazon S3.
keyPoints: Understand the shared responsibility model: security OF the cloud vs. security IN the cloud.
Know the differences between IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS service models.
Be able to explain the core characteristics: on-demand self-service, broad network access, resource pooling, rapid elasticity, measured service.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is responsible for all security, including customer data and application security.
Confusing the service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) and their respective management responsibilities.
Over-provisioning resources and not taking advantage of the elasticity, leading to high costs.
